acceptance.assertion: Existing full audit result files remain immutable or are migrated with explicit digest-bound provenance; no evidence is discarded to make the developer view smaller.

A deterministic generator produces a concise developer-facing summary containing scope, counts, accepted and rejected identities, key caveats, validation status and links to the authoritative full evidence.
Schema, documentation and tests state that the compact summary is a projection and cannot override CommonProject records or full audit evidence.

A reviewed privacy authoring guide or controlled vocabulary covers approximate, exact and hidden locations, uncertainty, partner-versus-identity boundaries and prohibited reconstruction of sensitive places.
Validators and examples preserve project-specific privacy_note and uncertainty_note content where it carries concrete facts; generic references cannot replace required record-level disclosures.
Closeout includes generator determinism tests, representative migration or example diffs, full validation, green CI and documentation readback.

approval.note: The compact summary must remain a deterministic projection, never audit authority. Shared privacy guidance may standardize wording but must not erase project-specific location, source or uncertainty facts.

goal: Keep full Commonworld catalogue audit evidence immutable while generating a compact non-authoritative developer summary, and define shared privacy authoring guidance that reduces repeated boilerplate without replacing record-specific uncertainty, hidden-location or non-claim disclosures.

does_not_establish: permission to delete or truncate full audit evidence
that all privacy notes can be centralized
that repeated language is itself incorrect
authority for a compact projection to override canonical records
metadata.observed_limit: The catalogue expansion result is deliberately audit-rich but cumbersome for routine review, and several privacy notes repeat policy vocabulary while also containing indispensable project-specific facts.

title: Generate compact audit summaries and privacy authoring guidance
